items.summary: Unauthorized static host route to 185.211.34.90/32 on edge-rtr01 — no change ticket, Abuse.ch-listed destination
items.correct_label: Compromise — unauthorized C2-directed static route manually inserted on the edge router

items.summary: Anomalous WAN egress on edge-rtr01 Gi0/3 (~48 Mbps out vs ~2.3 Mbps in, 892 GB cumulative outbound)
items.correct_label: Suspicious — egress:ingress ratio ~20:1 inconsistent with normal admin activity; corroborates exfiltration via the static route
